name: Wood and Cane 2 Drawer Nightstand Aged Oak - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Finish off the look of your sleeping area with the 2-Piece Wood and Cane 2 Drawer Nightstands from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. These two-piece of nightstands are designed in a rectangle shape with built-in drawers to give you enough space for your books, lamp and other essentials. Made of a wooden frame, this nightstand set fits nicely alongside your bed.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 23-5/8 inches
Overall Height: 24-1/4 inches
Overall Depth: 15-1/2 inches
Distance from floor to front rail: 4-3/8 inches
Thickness of top panel: 5/8 inches
Height of drawer front panel: 7-7/8 inches
Width of drawer front panel: 17-7/8 inches
Width of drawer box: 17 inches
Depth of drawer box: 11-3/4 inches
Height of drawer box: 5-7/8 inches
